description: You are an HR Specialist at Meridian Healthcare Network. Transform the raw text in /home/ga/Documents/raw_appraisal_content.docx into a structured, professional, fillable performance review form saved to /home/ga/Documents/formatted_appraisal_form.docx. The final document must use Arial 11pt font and include: a 'Title' styled heading for 'Annual Performance Appraisal'; a 2x3 Employee Information Table for the six data fields; a 5x2 Rating Scale Table with numbers 1-5 (light gray shading) and labels (Unacceptable to Outstanding); a Core Competencies Table with a bold header ('Competency', 'Description', 'Rating (1-5)', 'Manager Comments') containing the 8 competencies and descriptions from the source; a Future Goals Table with a 3-column header ('Goal Description', 'Success Metrics', 'Target Date') and 3 empty rows; and a signature block for Employee and Manager signatures and dates. Ensure all raw text is converted into the specified table structures.
